name: Metarank
description: Open-source low-code learn-to-rank service for personalized search, recommendations and article listings.

seo.title: Metarank — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Metarank: Open-source low-code learn-to-rank service for personalized search, recommendations and article listings.

when_to_use: Personalizing search result rankings based on user behavior
A/B testing different ranking models without engineering overhead
Building a real-time recommendation engine from click events
Replacing manual business rules with learned ranking models

pros: Works well for search and recommendation
cons: Requires event data pipelines you may not have
Smaller community than commercial ranking services
review.verdict: A pragmatic open-source ranking layer when a managed rec service feels like overkill.
review.best_for: Engineering teams personalizing search and lists with event data
review.not_for: Teams without event tracking or willing to pay for Algolia/Typesense
